title: Ammopiptanthus nanus
taxonomy: Ammopiptanthus nanus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Ammopiptanthus and is native to the mountainous regions of western China. The plant is also known as the "desert tree" due to its ability to thrive in arid environments. Further classification places Ammopiptanthus nanus as a member of the order Sapindales. This classification is based on the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the Zygophyllaceae family.
